name: 媒人

appearance.face: 圆脸喜气，表情精明讨巧
appearance.distinguishing_features: 满脸职业性笑容，擅察言观色

costume.typical_outfit: 体面妇人袄裙，颜色偏喜庆

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese matchmaker woman, lively expressive face, colorful traditional dress, practical and shrewd demeanor
visual_prompt_negative: modern outfit, fantasy look, gothic makeup, tattoo
personality: 圆滑，见风使舵，重促成婚事
desire: 顺利做成婚配，保全各方颜面
flaw: 只看成事，不问内里是否公允
scene_presence: 多次提亲场景中的事务推动者
